MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY'S Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment. GRANT.

No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the Health and Safety Code.

The court will sign the proposed order and judgment. Order and Judgment signed.
